title: taraxacum glandiforme
intro: Taraxacum glandiforme, also known as the glandular dandelion, is a species of flowering plant within the dandelion genus. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum glandiforme include its potential to support liver function, aid in digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Taraxacum glandiforme can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
